mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamMapper.quizBscSelect 설 명 : 퀴즈기본조회 */ WITH EXAM AS ( SELECT BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID , (SELECT MAX(EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N') AS EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM , EVL_SBST.EXAM_SBST_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_EVL_SBST EVL_SBST ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = EVL_SBST.EXAM_BSC_ID AND BSC.DELYN = 'N' AND BSC.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE BSC.EXAM_TYCD = 'EXAM' AND BSC.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_MID', 'EXAM_LST') ), SBJCT_USER AS ( SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' ) SELECT EXAM_BSC.* , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = EXAM_BSC.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , (SELECT SBJCTNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT WHERE SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID) AS SBJCTNM , (SELECT DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT WHERE SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID) AS DVCLAS_NO , (SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID FROM EXAM WHERE EXAM.EXAM_SBST_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID) AS PAR_EXAM_BSC_ID , (SELECT EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM FROM EXAM WHERE EXAM.EXAM_SBST_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID) AS PAR_EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM , CASE WHEN EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD LIKE '%SBST%' THEN (SELECT COUNT(TKEXAM.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM ON EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID WHERE TKEXAM.TKEXAM_CNT > 0 AND TKEXAM_SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND TKEXAM.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' AND EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER))) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(TKEXAM.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM ON EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID WHERE TKEXAM.TKEXAM_CNT > 0 AND TKEXAM_SDTTM IS NOT NULL AND EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND TKEXAM.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER)) END AS TKEXAM_STRT_USER_CNT , (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND ROWNUM = 1))) AS LRN_GRP_ID , (SELECT LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT_ID = EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID AND LRN_GRP_ID = (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND ROWNUM = 1)))) LRN_GRPNM , FN_REF_FILE_CNT(EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID) AS FILE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId}
mapper.delete: /* SQL ID : ExamMapper.examTrgtrDelete 설 명 : 시험대상자삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID IN (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId})
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamDAO.mrkRfltQuizList 설 명 : 성적반영퀴즈목록 */ SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ', 'QUIZ_TEAM') AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.quizGrpSbjctList 설 명 : 퀴즈그룹과목목록조회 */ WITH DVCLAS_SBJCT AS ( SELECT SBJCT_ID , EXAM_BSC_ID , LRN_GRP_SUBASMT_STNGYN , (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN ='Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC WHERE ( EXAM_GRP_ID = (SELECT EXAM_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DVCLAS_REGYN = 'Y') OR EXAM_BSC_ID = (SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DVCLAS_REGYN = 'N') ) AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' ) SELECT SBJCT_ID , DVCLAS_NO , (SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID) AS EXAM_BSC_ID , (SELECT LRN_GRP_SUBASMT_STNGYN FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID) AS LRN_GRP_SUBASMT_STNGYN , (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID))) AS LRN_GRP_ID , (SELECT LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID AND LRN_GRP_ID = (SELECT LRN_GRP_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_ID = (SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID)))) AS LRN_GRPNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID IN (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM DVCLAS_SBJCT) ORDER BY DVCLAS_NO
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.examBscIdSelect 설 명 : 시험기본아이디조회 */ SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_GRP_ID = #{examGrpId} AND SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.quizTeamList 설 명 : 퀴즈팀목록조회 */ SELECT EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID , EXAM_TRGTR.TEAM_ID , (SELECT TEAMNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM WHERE TEAM_CPST_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND TEAM_ID = EXAM_TRGTR.TEAM_ID) AS TEAMNM , EXAM_DTL.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR EXAM_TRGTR ON EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = EXAM_TRGTR.EXAM_DTL_ID WHERE EXAM_DTL.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_DTL.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.quizTeamQstnsCmptnynSelect 설 명 : 퀴즈팀문제출제완료여부조회 */ SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = COUNT(CASE WHEN EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y'

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.tkexamStrtUserCntSelect 설 명 : 시험응시시작사용자수조회 */ WITH SBJCT_USER AS ( SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' ), TKEXAM_USER AS ( SELECT TKEXAM.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM WHERE TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} AND TKEXAM.TKEXAM_CNT > 0 AND TKEXAM.TKEXAM_SDTTM IS NOT NULL ) SELECT CASE WHEN EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD LIKE '%SBST%' THEN (SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) FROM TKEXAM_USER WHERE USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' AND EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER))) ELSE (SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) FROM TKEXAM_USER WHERE USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER)) END AS TKEXAM_STRT_USER_CNT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL ON EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID AND EXAM_DTL.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_DTL.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE EXAM_BSC.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_BSC.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.sbjctDvclasList 설 명 : 과목분반목록조회 */ WITH SBJCT AS ( SELECT PROF_ID , SMSTR_CHRT_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' ) SELECT SBJCT.SBJCT_ID , SBJCT.SBJCTNM , SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO , SBJCT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID , SBJCT_ADM.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SMSTR_CHRT ON SBJCT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = SMSTR_CHRT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AND SBJCT.SBJCT_REF_TYCD = 'CHRT' JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM SBJCT_ADM ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT_ADM.SBJCT_ID AND SBJCT_ADM.SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'PROF' AND SBJCT_ADM.USER_ID = (SELECT PROF_ID FROM SBJCT) WHERE SBJCT.DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.USEYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = (SELECT SMSTR_CHRT_ID FROM SBJCT) ORDER BY SBJCT.DVCLAS_NO

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.exampprBulkExcelDownQuizTrgtrList 설 명 : 시험지일괄엑셀다운퀴즈대상자목록조회 */ WITH SBJCT_USER AS ( SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = 'SBJCT_OFRNG_ID1' ), EXAM_TRGTR_USER AS ( SELECT EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID , EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD , CASE EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD WHEN 'QUIZ' THEN SU.USER_ID WHEN 'QUIZ_EXAM_MID' THEN SU.USER_ID WHEN 'QUIZ_EXAM_LST' THEN SU.USER_ID WHEN 'QUIZ_TEAM' THEN TEAM_MBR.USER_ID WHEN 'QUIZ_SBST_EXAM_MID' THEN ABSNCE.USER_ID WHEN 'QUIZ_SBST_EXAM_LST' THEN ABSNCE.USER_ID END AS USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN SBJCT_USER SU ON EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ', 'QUIZ_EXAM_MID', 'QUIZ_EXAM_LST') LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR EXAM_TRGTR ON EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD = 'QUIZ_TEAM' AND EXAM_TRGTR.EXAM_DTL_ID IN ( SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N') LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TEAM_MBR ON EXAM_TRGTR.TEAM_ID = TEAM_MBR.TEAM_ID AND TEAM_MBR.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER) LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE ABSNCE ON EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ_SBST_EXAM_MID', 'QUIZ_SBST_EXAM_LST') AND ABSNCE.EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND ABSNCE.APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' AND ABSNCE.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER) WHERE EXAM_BSC.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND EXAM_BSC.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_BSC.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND CASE EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD WHEN 'QUIZ' THEN SU.USER_ID WHEN 'QUIZ_EXAM_MID' THEN SU.USER_ID WHEN 'QUIZ_EXAM_LST' THEN SU.USER_ID WHEN 'QUIZ_TEAM' THEN TEAM_MBR.USER_ID WHEN 'QUIZ_SBST_EXAM_MID' THEN ABSNCE.USER_ID WHEN 'QUIZ_SBST_EXAM_LST' THEN ABSNCE.USER_ID END IS NOT NULL AND NOT ( EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ_EXAM_MID', 'QUIZ_EXAM_LST') AND SU.USER_ID IN ( SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' AND EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID ) ) ) SELECT A.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.USERNM) AS LINE_NO FROM ( SELECT TRGTR_USER.EXAM_BSC_ID , TRGTR_USER.EXAM_GBNCD , TRGTR_USER.USER_ID , USR.STDNT_NO , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_DEPT WHERE ORG_ID = USR.ORG_ID AND DEPT_ID = USR.DEPT_ID) AS DEPTNM , USR.USERNM , NVL(TKEXAM.TKEXAM_CMPTNYN, 'N') AS TKEXAM_CMPTNYN , NVL(TKEXAM.RETKEXAM_YN, 'N') AS RETKEXAM_YN FROM EXAM_TRGTR_USER TRGTR_USER JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON TRGTR_USER.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM ON TRGTR_USER.USER_ID = TKEXAM.USER_ID AND TKEXAM.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID AND EXAM_BSC_ID = TRGTR_USER.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N') ) A ORDER BY A.USERNM
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.qstnCopySmstrList 설 명 : 문제가져오기학기기수목록조회 */ SELECT SMSTR_CHRT_ID , SMSTR_CHRTNM FROM TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.quizSearchSbjctList 설 명 : 문제가져오기과목목록조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCTNM , A.DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT B ON A.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = B.SMSTR_CHRT_ID WHERE B.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = #{smstrChrtId} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM WHERE SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'PROF' AND USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_ADM WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND SBJCT_ADM_TYCD = 'PROF') )

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.qstnCopyQuizList 설 명 : 문제가져오기퀴즈목록조회 */ SELECT EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID , NVL(EXAM_DTL.EXAM_TTL, EXAM_BSC.EXAM_TTL) AS EXAM_TTL FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID AND EXAM_BSC.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_BSC.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ', 'QUIZ_TEAM') AND EXAM_BSC.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL ON EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID AND EXAM_DTL.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_DTL.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE SBJCT.DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.USEYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
mapper.sql:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TO_DATE(D.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') DESC , A.EXAM_BSC_ID ASC) AS "LINE_NO" /* Row Number */ , A.EXAM_BSC_ID AS "EXAM_BSC_ID" /* 시험기본 ID */ , A.EXAM_TYCD AS "EXAM_TYCD" /* 시험유형코드 */ , A.EXAM_GBNCD AS "EXAM_GBNCD" /* 시험구분코드 */ , B.CDNM AS "EXAM_GBNNM" /* 시험구분코드명 */ , A.TKEXAM_MTHD_CD AS "TKEXAM_MTHD_CD" /* 시험응시방법코드 */ , CASE WHEN A.TKEXAM_MTHD_CD IS NULL THEN '' ELSE C.CDNM END AS "TKEXAM_MTHD_NM" /* 시험응시방법코드명 */ , A.EXAM_TTL AS "EXAM_TTL" /* 시험제목 */ , D.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM AS "EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM" /* 시험 시작일 */ , D.EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM AS "EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM" /* 시험 종료일 */ , D.EXAM_MNTS AS "EXAM_MNTS" /* 시험시간 */ , A.MRK_RFLTYN AS "MRK_RFLTYN" /* 성적반영여부 */ , TO_NUMBER(A.MRK_RFLTRT) AS "MRK_RFLTRT" /* 반영비율 */ /* 응시현황: (응시자) / (전체 수강생 - 결시자) */ , CASE WHEN A.BYTEAM_SUBREXAM_USEYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(TKEXAM_TEAM.CNT, 0) ELSE NVL(TKEXAM_INDI.CNT, 0) END || '/' || NVL(TOTAL_USR.CNT, 0) AS "TKEXAM_CMPTNYN_TOT" /* 응시현황 */ /* 평가현황: (평가 완료자) / (전체 수강생 - 결시자) */ , CASE WHEN A.BYTEAM_SUBREXAM_USEYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(EVLYN_TEAM.CNT, 0) ELSE NVL(EVLYN_INDI.CNT, 0) END || '/' || NVL(TOTAL_USR.CNT, 0) AS "EVLYN_TOT" /* 평가현황 */ , A.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN AS "EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN" /* 출제상태 */ , A.MRK_OYN AS "MRK_OYN" /* 성적공개 */ , A.BYTEAM_SUBREXAM_USEYN AS "BYTEAM_SUBREXAM_USEYN" /* 팀 시험 여부 */ FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A /* 시험구분코드 (공통코드) */ JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD B ON A.EXAM_GBNCD = B.CD AND B.UP_CD = 'EXAM_GBNCD' /* 시험응시방법코드 (공통코드) */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD C ON A.TKEXAM_MTHD_CD = C.CD AND C.UP_CD = 'TKEXAM_MTHD_CD' /* 시험상세 - EXAM_BSC_ID당 최신 1건만 선택 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT D.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY D.EXAM_BSC_ID ORDER BY D.EXAM_DTL_ID DESC) AS RN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL D ) WHERE RN = 1 ) D ON A.EXAM_BSC_ID = D.EXAM_BSC_ID /* 응시자 수 - 팀 시험: EXAM_BSC_ID별 응시한 팀 멤버 수 (전체 DTL 합산) */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR TRGTR JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TRGTR.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR MBR ON MBR.TEAM_ID = TRGTR.TEAM_ID WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK WHERE TK.EXAM_DTL_ID = TRGTR.EXAM_DTL_ID AND TK.USER_ID = MBR.USER_ID ) GROUP BY BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID ) TKEXAM_TEAM ON TKEXAM_TEAM.EXAM_BSC_ID = A.EXAM_BSC_ID /* 응시자 수 - 기본 시험: EXAM_BSC_ID별 응시한 수강생 수 (전체 DTL 합산, ATNDLC 기준) */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID , COUNT(DISTINCT TK.USER_ID) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TK.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATD ON ATD.SBJCT_ID = BSC.SBJCT_ID AND ATD.USER_ID = TK.USER_ID AND ATD.AUDITYN = 'N' AND ATD.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' GROUP BY BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID ) TKEXAM_INDI ON TKEXAM_INDI.EXAM_BSC_ID = A.EXAM_BSC_ID /* 평가 완료자 수 - 팀 시험: EXAM_BSC_ID별 EVLYN='Y' 인 팀 멤버 수 (전체 DTL 합산) */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR TRGTR JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TRGTR.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR MBR ON MBR.TEAM_ID = TRGTR.TEAM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK ON TK.EXAM_DTL_ID = TRGTR.EXAM_DTL_ID AND TK.USER_ID = MBR.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT RSLT ON RSLT.TKEXAM_ID = TK.TKEXAM_ID AND RSLT.USER_ID = MBR.USER_ID WHERE RSLT.EVLYN = 'Y' GROUP BY BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID ) EVLYN_TEAM ON EVLYN_TEAM.EXAM_BSC_ID = A.EXAM_BSC_ID /* 평가 완료자 수 - 기본 시험: EXAM_BSC_ID별 EVLYN='Y' 인 수강생 수 (전체 DTL 합산, ATNDLC 기준) */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID , COUNT(DISTINCT TK.USER_ID) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TK.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATD ON ATD.SBJCT_ID = BSC.SBJCT_ID AND ATD.USER_ID = TK.USER_ID AND ATD.AUDITYN = 'N' AND ATD.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT RSLT ON RSLT.TKEXAM_ID = TK.TKEXAM_ID AND RSLT.USER_ID = TK.USER_ID WHERE RSLT.EVLYN = 'Y' GROUP BY BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID ) EVLYN_INDI ON EVLYN_INDI.EXAM_BSC_ID = A.EXAM_BSC_ID /* 전체 수강생 수 - 결시 승인자 제외 (TKEXAM_CMPTNYN_TOT, EVLYN_TOT 분모 공통) */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID , COUNT(DISTINCT ATD.USER_ID) AS CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATD JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC ON BSC.SBJCT_ID = ATD.SBJCT_ID WHERE ATD.AUDITYN = 'N' AND ATD.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE ABSNCE WHERE ABSNCE.EXAM_BSC_ID = BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID /* 결시자 제외 */ AND ABSNCE.APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' AND ABSNCE.USER_ID = ATD.USER_ID ) GROUP BY BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID ) TOTAL_USR ON TOTAL_USR.EXAM_BSC_ID = A.EXAM_BSC_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} /* 시험 구분이 퀴즈인 것은 제외 */ AND A.EXAM_TYCD NOT LIKE '%QUIZ%'
AND A.EXAM_TTL LIKE '%' || #{examTtl} || '%'

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TO_DATE(SBST.REG_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') DESC) AS "LINE_NO" , BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AS "EXAM_BSC_ID" , SBST.EXAM_EVL_SBST_ID AS "EXAM_EVL_SBST_ID" , CMMN1.CDNM AS "EXAM_EVL_SBSTNM" , CASE WHEN ASMT.ASMT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'ASMT' /* 과제 */ WHEN QUIZ.EXAM_BSC_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'QUIZ' /* 퀴즈 */ END AS "GBN" /* 과제 */ , ASMT.ASMT_TTL AS "ASMT_TTL" , ASMT.ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM AS "ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM" , ASMT.ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM AS "ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM" , ASMT.EVL_SCR_TYCD AS "EVL_SCR_TYCD" , CMMN2.CDNM AS "EVL_SCR_TYNM" /* 퀴즈 */ , QUIZ.EXAM_TTL AS "EXAM_TTL" , QUIZ_DTL.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM AS "EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM" , QUIZ_DTL.EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM AS "EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM" , SBST.REG_DTTM AS "REG_DTTM" FROM /* 시험 기본 */ TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC /* 시험 대체 평가 */ JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_EVL_SBST SBST ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = SBST.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMN1 ON SBST.EXAM_SBST_TYCD = CMMN1.CD AND CMMN1.UP_CD = 'EXAM_SBST_TYCD' /* 과제 */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT ASMT ON BSC.SBJCT_ID = ASMT.SBJCT_ID AND SBST.EXAM_SBST_ID = ASMT.ASMT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMN2 ON ASMT.EVL_SCR_TYCD = CMMN2.CD AND CMMN2.UP_CD = 'EVL_SCR_TYCD' /* 퀴즈 */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC QUIZ ON BSC.SBJCT_ID = QUIZ.SBJCT_ID AND SBST.EXAM_SBST_ID = QUIZ.EXAM_BSC_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL QUIZ_DTL ON QUIZ.EXAM_BSC_ID = QUIZ_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID WHERE BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID =#{examBscId}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.EXAM_BSC_ID DESC) AS "LINE_NO" , E.DEPTNM AS "DEPTNM" , D.USER_RPRS_ID AS "USER_RPRS_ID" , D.STDNT_NO AS "STDNT_NO" , D.USER_ID AS "USER_ID" , D.USERNM AS "USERNM" , C.ABSNCE_CTS AS "ABSNCE_CTS" , C.ABSNCE_RFLTRT AS "ABSNCE_RFLTRT" , CASE WHEN C.APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "APLY_STS_STTS" , (SELECT CNTCT FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT WHERE CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN' AND USER_ID = D.USER_ID) AS "MOBILE_NO" , (SELECT CNTCT FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT WHERE CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML' AND USER_ID = D.USER_ID) AS "EMAIL" FROM /* 시험 기본 */ TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A /* 과목 수강 */ JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' AND B.AUDITYN = 'N' /* 시험 결시 */ JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND A.EXAM_BSC_ID = C.EXAM_BSC_ID /* 사용자 */ JOIN TB_LMS_USER D ON B.USER_ID = D.USER_ID /* 학과 */ JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT E ON D.DEPT_ID = E.DEPT_ID WHERE A.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY D.USERNM DESC) AS "LINE_NO" , E.DEPTNM AS "DEPTNM" , D.USER_RPRS_ID AS "USER_RPRS_ID" , D.STDNT_NO AS "STDNT_NO" , D.USERNM AS "USERNM" , C.USER_ID AS "USER_ID" , CASE WHEN C.APLY_STSCD = 'APLY' THEN '1' /* 신청 */ WHEN C.APLY_STSCD = 'RE_APLY' THEN '2' /* 재신청 */ WHEN C.APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' THEN '3' /* 승인 */ WHEN C.APLY_STSCD = 'RJCT' THEN '4' /* 거절 */ END AS "APLY_STSNM" , C.REG_DTTM AS "REG_DTTM" , F.CDNM AS "EXAM_GBNNM" , C.APRVDTTM AS "APRVDTTM" , C.AUTZR_ID AS "AUTZR_ID" , A.EXAM_BSC_ID AS "EXAM_BSC_ID" FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A /* 과목 수강 */ JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' AND B.AUDITYN = 'N' /* 결시 (학생별 최신 신청 1건) */ LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM (SELECT ABSNCE.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EXAM_BSC_ID, USER_ID ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC) AS RN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE ABSNCE) WHERE RN = 1) C ON A.EXAM_BSC_ID = C.EXAM_BSC_ID AND B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID /* 사용자 */ JOIN TB_LMS_USER D ON C.USER_ID = D.USER_ID /* 학과 */ JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT E ON D.DEPT_ID = E.DEPT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD F ON A.EXAM_GBNCD = F.CD AND F.UP_CD = 'EXAM_GBNCD' WHERE A.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId}
AND C.APLY_STSCD = 'APLY'
AND C.APLY_STSCD = 'RE_APLY'
AND C.APLY_STSCD = 'APRV'
AND C.APLY_STSCD = 'RJCT'
AND ( LOWER(E.DEPTNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(D.STDNT_NO) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(D.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ABSNCE.REG_DTTM DESC) AS "LINE_NO" , USR.STDNT_NO AS "STDNT_NO" , USR.USERNM AS "USERNM" , DEPT.DEPTNM AS "DEPTNM" , (SELECT CNTCT FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT WHERE CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN' AND USER_ID = ABSNCE.USER_ID) AS "MOBILE_NO" , (SELECT CNTCT FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT WHERE CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML' AND USER_ID = ABSNCE.USER_ID) AS "EMAIL" , CMMNCD.CDNM AS "EXAM_GBNNM" , ABSNCE.APLY_STSCD AS "APLY_STSCD" , ABSNCE.APRVDTTM AS "APRVDTTM" , ABSNCE.ABSNCE_TTL AS "ABSNCE_TTL" , ABSNCE.ABSNCE_RFLTRT AS "ABSNCE_RFLTRT" , ABSNCE.APRV_CTS AS "APRV_CTS" FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE ABSNCE ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = ABSNCE.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON ABSNCE.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON USR.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMNCD ON BSC.EXAM_GBNCD = CMMNCD.CD AND CMMNCD.UP_CD = 'EXAM_GBNCD' WHERE BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND ABSNCE.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY USR.USERNM DESC) AS "LINE_NO" , ATN.SBJCT_ID AS "SBJCT_ID" , DEPT.DEPTNM AS "DEPTNM" , ATN.USER_ID AS "USER_ID" , USR.USER_RPRS_ID AS "USER_RPRS_ID" , USR.STDNT_NO AS "STDNT_NO" , USR.USERNM AS "USERNM" , CASE WHEN USR.SNRYN = 'Y' THEN 'Seniors' ELSE 'Disabled' END AS "USER_STATUS" , CMMN1.CDNM AS "DSBL_TYNM" , CMMN2.CDNM AS "DSBL_GRDNM" , CASE WHEN SPRT_MID.EXAM_SPRT_APLY_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "MID_EXAM" , CASE WHEN SPRT_LST.EXAM_SPRT_APLY_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "FLN_EXAM" , CMMN3.CDNM AS "EXAM_SPRT_APLY_TYNM" , CASE WHEN SPRT_MID.APRVDTTM IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(SPRT_MID.ADD_MNTS) ELSE '' END AS "SPRT_MID_ADD_MNTS" , CASE WHEN SPRT_LST.APRVDTTM IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(SPRT_LST.ADD_MNTS) ELSE '' END AS "SPRT_LST_ADD_MNTS" , SPRT_MID.CNCL_APLY_STSCD AS "MID_CNCL_APLY_STSCD" , SPRT_LST.CNCL_APLY_STSCD AS "LST_CNCL_APLY_STSCD" , BSC_MID.EXAM_BSC_ID AS "MID_EXAM_BSC_ID" , BSC_LST.EXAM_BSC_ID AS "LST_EXAM_BSC_ID" , (SELECT CNTCT FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT WHERE CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN' AND USER_ID = USR.USER_ID) AS "MOBILE_NO" , (SELECT CNTCT FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT WHERE CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML' AND USER_ID = USR.USER_ID) AS "EMAIL" FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATN JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON ATN.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID AND (USR.DSBLYN = 'Y' OR USR.SNRYN = 'Y') JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON USR.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC_MID ON ATN.SBJCT_ID = BSC_MID.SBJCT_ID AND BSC_MID.EXAM_GBNCD LIKE '%EXAM_MID%' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC_LST ON ATN.SBJCT_ID = BSC_LST.SBJCT_ID AND BSC_LST.EXAM_GBNCD LIKE '%EXAM_LST%' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_SPRT_APLY SPRT_MID ON BSC_MID.EXAM_BSC_ID = SPRT_MID.EXAM_BSC_ID AND ATN.USER_ID = SPRT_MID.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_SPRT_APLY SPRT_LST ON BSC_LST.EXAM_BSC_ID = SPRT_LST.EXAM_BSC_ID AND ATN.USER_ID = SPRT_LST.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMN1 ON USR.MN_DSBL_CD = CMMN1.CD AND CMMN1.UP_CD = 'DSBL_TYCD' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMN2 ON USR.MN_DSBL_GRDCD = CMMN2.CD AND CMMN2.UP_CD = 'DSBL_GRDCD' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMN3 ON USR.EXAM_SPRT_APLY_TYCD = CMMN3.CD AND CMMN3.UP_CD = 'EXAM_SPRT_APLY_TYCD' WHERE ATN.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
AND SPRT_MID.APLY_STSCD IN ('APLY', 'RE_APLY') AND SPRT_LST.APLY_STSCD IN ('APLY', 'RE_APLY')
AND SPRT_MID.APLY_STSCD IN ('APRV', 'RJCT') AND SPRT_LST.APLY_STSCD IN ('APRV', 'RJCT')
AND (LOWER(DEPT.DEPTNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(USR.STDNT_NO) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(USR.USERNM) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : ExamMapper.examTrgtrRegist2 설 명 : 시험 대상자 등록 (수정용) */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR ( EXAM_TRGTR_ID , EXAM_DTL_ID , TEAM_ID , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{examTrgtrId} , #{examDtlId} , #{teamId} , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listProfExam 설명 : 교수 시험목록 조회 */
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listProfExamPaging 설명 : 교수 시험목록 페이징 */
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.countProfExam 설명 : 교수 시험목록 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM () Z

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectProfExamDtl 설명 : 교수 시험 상세조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT A.EXAM_GBNCD AS "EXAM_GBNCD" /* 시험구분코드 */ , C.CDNM AS "EXAM_GBNNM" /* 시험구분명 */ , A.EXAM_TTL AS "EXAM_TTL" /* 제목 */ , A.TKEXAM_MTHD_CD AS "TKEXAM_MTHD_CD" /* 시험방식코드 */ , D.CDNM AS "TKEXAM_MTHD_NM" /* 시험방식명 */ , B.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM AS "EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM" /* 시험 시작일 */ , B.EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM AS "EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM" /* 시험 종료일 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS "EXAM_DRTN" /* 시험일시(기간) */ , A.MRK_RFLTYN AS "MRK_RFLTYN" /* 성적반영여부 */ , A.MRK_OYN AS "MRK_OYN" /* 성적공개여부 */ , A.EXAM_CTS AS "EXAM_CTS" /* 시험내용 */ , B.EXAM_MNTS AS "EXAM_MNTS" /* 시험시간 */ , A.MRK_RFLTRT AS "MRK_RFLTRT" /* 성적반영비율 */ , A.EXAMPPR_OYN AS "EXAMPPR_OYN" /* 시험지공개여부 */ , A.BYTEAM_SUBREXAM_USEYN AS "BYTEAM_SUBREXAM_USEYN" /* 팀시험여부 */ , A.SBJCT_ID AS "SBJCT_ID" /* 과목 ID */ , CASE WHEN E.EXAM_SBST_TYCD = 'SBST_ASMT' THEN '과제' WHEN E.EXAM_SBST_TYCD = 'SBST_DSCS' THEN '토론' WHEN E.EXAM_SBST_TYCD = 'SBST_QUIZ' THEN '퀴즈' ELSE '-' END AS "EXAM_SBST_TYNM" /* 시험대체코드명 */ , (SELECT COUNT(USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = A.EXAM_BSC_ID) AS "ABSNCE_TOT" /* 결시인원 COUNT */ , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC T /* TB_LMS_TKEXAM T */ JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON T.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE T.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND (U.DSBLYN = 'Y' OR U.SNRYN = 'Y')) AS "DSBL_TOT" /* 장애인/고령자 COUNT */ FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A /* 시험상세 */ JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL B ON A.EXAM_BSC_ID = B.EXAM_BSC_ID /* 시험구분코드 */ JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD C ON A.EXAM_GBNCD = C.CD AND C.UP_CD = 'EXAM_GBNCD' /* 시험방식코드 */ JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD D ON A.TKEXAM_MTHD_CD = D.CD AND D.UP_CD = 'TKEXAM_MTHD_CD' /* 시험대체 */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_EVL_SBST E ON A.EXAM_BSC_ID = E.EXAM_BSC_ID WHERE A.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} /* 시험 구분이 퀴즈인 것은 제외 */ AND A.EXAM_TYCD NOT LIKE '%QUIZ%'

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectProfExamTeamDtl 설명 : 교수 팀 시험 상세조회 */ SELECT A.LRN_GRP_ID AS "LRN_GRP_ID" /* 그룹 ID */ , A.LRN_GRPNM AS "LRN_GRPNM" /* 그룹 명 */ , B.TEAM_ID AS "TEAM_ID" /* 팀 ID */ , B.TEAMNM AS "TEAMNM" /* 팀 명 */ , D.USERNM AS "LDRNM" /* 팀 리더 명 */ , F.EXAM_TTL AS "EXAM_TTL" /* 시험 제목 */ , F.EXAM_CTS AS "EXAM_CTS" /* 시험 내용 */ , ( SELECT COUNT(SUB1.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR SUB1 WHERE SUB1.TEAM_ID = B.TEAM_ID ) AS "TEAM_MBR_TOT" /* 팀 인원 */ FROM /* 팀 그룹 */ TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP A /* 팀 */ JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM B ON A.LRN_GRP_ID = B.LRN_GRP_ID /* 팀 멤버 (리더 추출용도) */ JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR C ON B.TEAM_ID = C.TEAM_ID AND C.LDRYN = 'Y' /* 사용자 */ JOIN TB_LMS_USER D ON C.USER_ID = D.USER_ID /* 시험 대상자 */ JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR E ON B.TEAM_ID = E.TEAM_ID /* 시험 상세 */ JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL F ON E.EXAM_DTL_ID = F.EXAM_DTL_ID WHERE F.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId}
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listTkexamUserPaging 설명 : 시험 평가대상자 목록 페이징 */
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.countTkexamUser 설명 : 시험 평가대상자 목록 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM () Z
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.tkexamUserList 설명 : 시험 평가대상자 목록 조회 */

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.mrkRfltExamList 설 명 : 성적 반영 시험목록 */ SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID , EXAM_TTL FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} /* 시험 구분이 퀴즈인 것은 제외 */ AND EXAM_TYCD NOT LIKE '%QUIZ%' /* 성적 반영을 하는 시험만 */ AND MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' /* 중간, 기말은 제외 */ AND NOT (EXAM_GBNCD LIKE '%EXAM_MID%' OR EXAM_GBNCD LIKE '%EXAM_LST%') AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N'
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectBscTeamYn 설명 : 팀 시험여부 조회 */ SELECT A.BYTEAM_SUBREXAM_USEYN AS "BYTEAM_SUBREXAM_USEYN" /* 팀별부시험사용여부 */ FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A WHERE A.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId}

/* SQL ID : TkexamDAO.selectUserTkexamStatusForPieChart 설 명 : 사용자 시험 응시현황 (파이)차트데이터 조회 */ SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TKEXAM_CD = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS NO_TKEXAM_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TKEXAM_CD = 'T' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TEMP_SAVE_CNT , NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TKEXAM_CD = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS COMPLETE_CNT , NVL(ROUND(AVG(QUIZ_SCR)), 0) AS AVG_SCORE , NVL(MAX(QUIZ_SCR), 0) AS MAX_SCORE , NVL(MIN(QUIZ_SCR), 0) AS MIN_SCORE , NVL(ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN LINE_NO <= CNT THEN QUIZ_SCR ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(CNT,0)),0) AS TOP_AVG_SCORE FROM ( SELECT QUIZ_SCR , TKEXAM_CD , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY QUIZ_SCR DESC) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(1) OVER () / 10 AS CNT FROM ( SELECT TKEXAM.QUIZ_SCR , CASE WHEN TKEXAM.TKEXAM_SDTTM IS NULL THEN 'N' WHEN TKEXAM.TKEXAM_EDTTM IS NULL THEN 'T' WHEN TKEXAM.TKEXAM_EDTTM IS NOT NULL THEN 'C' END AS TKEXAM_CD , CASE /* 일반 시험 */ WHEN EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD IN (SELECT CD FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'EXAM_GBNCD' AND CD NOT LIKE '%QUIZ%' AND CD NOT LIKE '%TEAM%') THEN CASE WHEN SBJCT_USER.USER_ID NOT IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE /* 결시자 제외 */ APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' AND EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END /* 팀 시험 */ WHEN EXAM_BSC.EXAM_GBNCD IN (SELECT CD FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'EXAM_GBNCD' AND CD NOT LIKE '%QUIZ%') THEN CASE WHEN SBJCT_USER.USER_ID IN (SELECT TEAM_MBR.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TEAM_MBR JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR EXAM_TRGTR ON TEAM_MBR.TEAM_ID = EXAM_TRGTR.TEAM_ID WHERE /* 시험 기본 - 시험 상세 ID 추출 */ EXAM_TRGTR.EXAM_DTL_ID IN (SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID AND USEYN = 'Y' AND DELYN = 'N' ) /* 결시자 제외 */ AND SBJCT_USER.USER_ID NOT IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE WHERE APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' AND EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID)) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END AS IS_TARGET FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID JOIN (SELECT USER_ID , SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC WHERE AUDITYN = 'N' AND SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ) SBJCT_USER ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT_USER.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT TKEXAM.USER_ID , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_SDTTM , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_EDTTM , NVL(SUM(ANSW.SCR), 0) AS QUIZ_SCR FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM TKEXAM JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL ON TKEXAM.EXAM_DTL_ID = EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID AND EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND EXAM_DTL.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_DTL.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAMPPR EXAMPPR ON TKEXAM.TKEXAM_ID = EXAMPPR.TKEXAM_ID AND TKEXAM.USER_ID = EXAMPPR.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_ANSW_SHT ANSW ON EXAMPPR.EXAMPPR_ID = ANSW.EXAMPPR_ID AND EXAMPPR.USER_ID = ANSW.USER_ID WHERE TKEXAM.DELYN = 'N' GROUP BY TKEXAM.USER_ID , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_SDTTM , TKEXAM.TKEXAM_EDTTM ) TKEXAM ON SBJCT_USER.USER_ID = TKEXAM.USER_ID WHERE EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND EXAM_BSC.DELYN = 'N' AND EXAM_BSC.USEYN = 'Y') WHERE IS_TARGET = 'Y') GROUP BY CNT

/* SQL ID : TkexamDAO.selectUserTkexamStatusForHrChart 설 명 : 사용자 시험 응시현황 (가로선)차트데이터 조회 */ /* 점수 구간 정의 */ WITH SCORE_T AS (SELECT -1 AS SP, 10 AS EP, '0~10' AS LABEL, 1 AS ODR FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 10, 20, '11~20', 2 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 20, 30, '21~30', 3 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 30, 40, '31~40', 4 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 40, 50, '41~50', 5 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 50, 60, '51~60', 6 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 60, 70, '61~70', 7 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 70, 80, '71~80', 8 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 80, 90, '81~90', 9 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 90, 100, '91~100', 10 FROM dual) /* 대상자 목록: SBJCT_ID 파라미터로 수강 학생 조회 (팀 여부 무관) */ , STD_T AS (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} /* 수강중인 수강생만 */ AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' AND AUDITYN = 'N') /* 시험 상세 목록: EXAM_BSC_ID 파라미터로 해당 시험의 EXAM_DTL_ID 조회 */ , EXAM_DTL_T AS (SELECT DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID AND DTL.DELYN = 'N' WHERE BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND BSC.DELYN = 'N') /* TKEXAM_ID 가 없는 미응시자는 이 CTE 에 포함되지 않음 LEFT JOIN 으로 0점 처리 */ , TKEXAM_SCR_T AS (SELECT ANSW.USER_ID , EXAMPPR.TKEXAM_ID , SUM(ANSW.SCR) AS EXAM_SCR FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM_ANSW_SHT ANSW JOIN TB_LMS_EXAMPPR EXAMPPR ON ANSW.EXAMPPR_ID = EXAMPPR.EXAMPPR_ID AND ANSW.USER_ID = EXAMPPR.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK ON EXAMPPR.TKEXAM_ID = TK.TKEXAM_ID AND TK.DELYN = 'N' JOIN EXAM_DTL_T ON TK.EXAM_DTL_ID = EXAM_DTL_T.EXAM_DTL_ID GROUP BY ANSW.USER_ID , EXAMPPR.TKEXAM_ID) /* 재응시가 있는 경우 유저당 최고 점수 적용 */ , USER_MAX_SCR_T AS (SELECT USER_ID , MAX(EXAM_SCR) AS SCR FROM TKEXAM_SCR_T GROUP BY USER_ID) /* 대상자 전체 + 점수 결합 (미응시자 = 0점) */ ,EXAM_SCORE_RAW AS (SELECT S.USER_ID , NVL(U.SCR, 0) AS SCR FROM STD_T S LEFT JOIN USER_MAX_SCR_T U ON S.USER_ID = U.USER_ID) SELECT T.LABEL , COUNT(S.USER_ID) AS CNT FROM SCORE_T T LEFT JOIN EXAM_SCORE_RAW S ON T.SP < S.SCR AND T.EP >= S.SCR GROUP BY T.LABEL , T.ODR ORDER BY T.ODR
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listProfSbstPaging 설명 : 교수 시험대체 목록 페이징 */
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.countProfSbst 설명 : 교수 시험대체 목록 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM () Z

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectProfSbstAsmt 설명 : 교수 시험대체 과제 조회 */ SELECT ASMT.ASMT_TTL AS "ASMT_TTL" , ASMT.ASMT_CTS AS "ASMT_CTS" , ASMT.ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM AS "ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM" , ASMT.ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM AS "ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM" , ASMT.MRK_RFLTYN AS "MRK_RFLTYN" , ASMT.MRK_OYN AS "MRK_OYN" , ASMT.EVL_SCR_TYCD AS "EVL_SCR_TYCD" , ASMT.SBASMT_TYCD AS "SBASMT_TYCD" , ASMT.SBMSN_FILE_MIME_TYCD AS "SBMSN_FILE_MIME_TYCD" FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_EVL_SBST SBST ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = SBST.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT ASMT ON SBST.EXAM_SBST_ID = ASMT.ASMT_ID WHERE BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectProfSbstQuiz 설명 : 교수 시험대체 퀴즈 조회 */ SELECT QUIZ.EXAM_TTL AS "EXAM_TTL" , QUIZ.EXAM_CTS AS "EXAM_CTS" , QUIZ_DTL.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM AS "EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM" , QUIZ_DTL.EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM AS "EXAM_PSBL_EDTTM" , QUIZ_DTL.EXAM_MNTS AS "EXAM_MNTS" , QUIZ.MRK_RFLTYN AS "MRK_RFLTYN" , QUIZ.MRK_OYN AS "MRK_OYN" , QUIZ.QSTN_DSPLY_GBNCD AS "QSTN_DSPLY_GBNCD" , QUIZ.QSTN_RNDMYN AS "QSTN_RNDMYN" , QUIZ.QSTN_VWITM_RNDMYN AS "QSTN_VWITM_RNDMYN" FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_EVL_SBST SBST ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = SBST.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC QUIZ ON SBST.EXAM_SBST_ID = QUIZ.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL QUIZ_DTL ON QUIZ.EXAM_BSC_ID = QUIZ_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID WHERE BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId}
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listProfSbstUserPaging 설명 : 교수 시험대체 대상자 목록 페이징 */
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.countProfSbstUser 설명 : 교수 시험대체 대상자 목록 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM () Z
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listProfAbsnceUserPaging 설명 : 교수 시험 결시자 목록 페이징 */
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.countProfAbsnceUser 설명 : 교수 시험 결시자 목록 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM () Z
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listProfAbsnceUser 설명 : 교수 시험 결시자 목록 조회 */

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectAbsnceRslt 설명 : 결시자 결시신청 결과 조회 */ SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ABSNCE.REG_DTTM DESC) AS "LINE_NO" , ABSNCE.APLY_STSCD , ABSNCE.APRVDTTM , BSC.SBJCT_ID , SBJCT.SBJCTNM , SBJCT.DVCLAS_NCKNM , ABSNCE.APRV_CTS , DEPT.DEPTNM , SBJCT.SMSTR_CHRT_ID , CMMNCD.CDNM AS "EXAM_GBNNM" , DTL.EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM , PROF.USERNM AS "PROFNM" , '' AS "TUTNM" /* 튜터 정보로 수정 예정 */ , USR.USER_RPRS_ID , USR.STDNT_NO , USR.USERNM AS "USERNM" , (SELECT CNTCT FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT WHERE CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN' AND USER_ID = ABSNCE.USER_ID) AS "MOBILE_NO" , ABSNCE.ABSNCE_TTL , ABSNCE.ABSNCE_RFLTRT , ABSNCE.ABSNCE_CTS , '' AS "FILE" /* 추후 첨부파일 경로로 수정 예정 */ FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE ABSNCE ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = ABSNCE.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON BSC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON ABSNCE.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER PROF ON BSC.RGTR_ID = PROF.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON DEPT.DEPT_ID = USR.DEPT_ID JOIN (SELECT EXAM_BSC_ID , MIN(EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM) AS EXAM_PSBL_SDTTM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL GROUP BY EXAM_BSC_ID ) DTL ON BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMNCD ON BSC.EXAM_GBNCD = CMMNCD.CD AND CMMNCD.UP_CD = 'EXAM_GBNCD' WHERE BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} AND ABSNCE.USER_ID = #{userId} ) T WHERE T.LINE_NO = 1
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listAbsnceUserHstrPaging 설명 : 결시자 결시신청 이력 목록 페이징 */
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.countAbsnceUserHstr 설명 : 결시자 결시신청 이력 목록 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM () Z
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.listDsblUserHstrPaging 설명 : 장애인/고령자 시험 지원 목록 페이징 */
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.countAbsnceUserHstr 설명 : 장애인/고령자 시험 지원 목록 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM () Z
/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.tkexamUserList 설명 : 장애인/고령자 시험 지원 목록 조회 */

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.selectDsblDtl 설명 : 장애인/고령자 시험 지원 상세 조회 */ SELECT USR.STDNT_NO AS "STDNT_NO" , USR.USERNM AS "USERNM" , DEPT.DEPTNM AS "DEPTNM" , (SELECT CNTCT FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT WHERE CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN' AND USER_ID = USR.USER_ID) AS "MOBILE_NO" , CASE WHEN USR.SNRYN = 'Y' THEN 'Seniors' ELSE 'Disabled' END AS "USER_STATUS" , CMMN1.CDNM AS "DSBL_TYNM" , CMMN2.CDNM AS "DSBL_GRDNM" , CMMN4.CDNM AS "SCND_DSBL_TYNM" , CMMN5.CDNM AS "SCND_DSBL_GRDNM" , ATN.SBJCT_ID AS "SBJCT_ID" , SBJCT.DVCLAS_NCKNM AS "DVCLAS_NCKNM" , SBJCT.SBJCTNM AS "SBJCTNM" , SPRT_MID.REG_DTTM AS "REG_DTTM" , CMMN3.CDNM AS "EXAM_SPRT_APLY_TYNM" , DTL_MID.EXAM_MNTS AS "MID_EXAM_MNTS" , SPRT_MID.ADD_MNTS AS "SPRT_MID_ADD_MNTS" , DTL_LST.EXAM_MNTS AS "LST_EXAM_MNTS" , SPRT_LST.ADD_MNTS AS "SPRT_LST_ADD_MNTS" FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATN JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON ATN.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID AND (USR.DSBLYN = 'Y' OR USR.SNRYN = 'Y') JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON USR.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID /* 중간 고사 */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC_MID ON ATN.SBJCT_ID = BSC_MID.SBJCT_ID AND BSC_MID.EXAM_GBNCD LIKE '%EXAM_MID%' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_SPRT_APLY SPRT_MID ON BSC_MID.EXAM_BSC_ID = SPRT_MID.EXAM_BSC_ID AND ATN.USER_ID = SPRT_MID.USER_ID JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT EXAM_MNTS , EXAM_BSC_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL A) DTL_MID ON BSC_MID.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL_MID.EXAM_BSC_ID /* 기말 고사 */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC BSC_LST ON ATN.SBJCT_ID = BSC_LST.SBJCT_ID AND BSC_LST.EXAM_GBNCD LIKE '%EXAM_LST%' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_SPRT_APLY SPRT_LST ON BSC_LST.EXAM_BSC_ID = SPRT_LST.EXAM_BSC_ID AND ATN.USER_ID = SPRT_LST.USER_ID JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT EXAM_MNTS , EXAM_BSC_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL A) DTL_LST ON BSC_LST.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL_LST.EXAM_BSC_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMN1 ON USR.MN_DSBL_CD = CMMN1.CD AND CMMN1.UP_CD = 'DSBL_TYCD' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMN2 ON USR.MN_DSBL_GRDCD = CMMN2.CD AND CMMN2.UP_CD = 'DSBL_GRDCD' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMN3 ON USR.EXAM_SPRT_APLY_TYCD = CMMN3.CD AND CMMN3.UP_CD = 'EXAM_SPRT_APLY_TYCD' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMN4 ON USR.SCND_DSBL_CD = CMMN4.CD AND CMMN4.UP_CD = 'DSBL_TYCD' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CMMN5 ON USR.SCND_DSBL_GRDCD = CMMN5.CD AND CMMN5.UP_CD = 'DSBL_GRDCD' JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATN.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID WHERE ATN.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND ATN.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.delete: /* SQL ID : ExamDAO.deleteExamBscInfo 설명 : 시험 기본정보 삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId}

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.deleteExamDtlInfo 설명 : 시험 상세정보 삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID IN ( SELECT B.EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL B ON A.EXAM_BSC_ID = B.EXAM_BSC_ID WHERE A.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} )

/* SQL ID : ExamDAO.deleteExamTrgtr 설명 : 시험 대상자 삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_TRGTR WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID IN ( SELECT B.EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL B ON A.EXAM_BSC_ID = B.EXAM_BSC_ID WHERE A.EXAM_BSC_ID = #{examBscId} )
